name: Traditional Cast Iron Side  Table - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a vintage charm to your home interior with this Metal Accent Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Supported by a metal frame, this accent table features a round tabletop, providing a stable base to place your lamps, vases, and other decorative accents. Plus, this three-legged table is designed in a black hue, making it compatible with various decor schemes.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Diameter: 15 inches
Overall Height: 22 inches
Thickness of Top: 0.5 inches
Distance between tripod joint to top joint: 16 inches
Overall Diameter of Rod: 0.85 inches
Distance from floor to tripod joint: 6 inches
Distance from one Leg to another Leg: 11.4 inches
Overall Diameter of Legs: 0.8 inches
Overall Diameter of Ball: 1 inches
